---
title: "CV"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .cv-download {
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .cv-section {
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .cv-section h2 {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
    padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .cv-entry {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: baseline;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.25rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.1rem;
  }
  .cv-entry .cv-left {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.97rem;
  }
  .cv-entry .cv-right {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #444;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .cv-role {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: baseline;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.15rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .cv-role .cv-title {
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
  }
  .cv-role .cv-date {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #444;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .cv-detail {
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    color: #333;
    margin: 0.1rem 0 0.5rem 0;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  ul.cv-bullets {
    margin: 0.3rem 0 0.5rem 0;
    padding-left: 1.25rem;
    font-size: 0.93rem;
  }
  ul.cv-bullets li {
    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  ul.cv-sub {
    list-style-type: none;
    padding-left: 1rem;
    margin: 0.25rem 0 0.25rem 0;
  }
  ul.cv-sub li::before {
    content: "– ";
    color: #555;
  }
  ul.cv-sub li {
    margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
  }
  .cv-skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 0.3rem 1.5rem;
    font-size: 0.93rem;
  }
  .cv-skills-grid span::before {
    content: "• ";
    color: #555;
  }
</style>
```

::: {.cv-download}
<a href="files/Heeneman_Colin_CV.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">Download PDF</a>
:::

---

::: {.cv-section}
## Education

::: {.cv-entry}
[University of Illinois Chicago]{.cv-left}
[Chicago, IL]{.cv-right}
:::
::: {.cv-role}
[Master of Public Policy]{.cv-title}
[Dec 2022 – Dec 2024]{.cv-date}
:::
::: {.cv-detail}
Specialization in Public Health Policy · GPA: 3.93/4.0
*Relevant Coursework:* Data Analysis, Policy Analysis, Program Design and Evaluation, Public Administration
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
[University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign]{.cv-left}
[Urbana, IL]{.cv-right}
:::
::: {.cv-role}
[Bachelor of Political Science]{.cv-title}
[Aug 2018 – May 2022]{.cv-date}
:::
::: {.cv-detail}
Concentration in Public Policy and Democratic Institutions · GPA: 3.6/4.0
*Relevant Coursework:* Intro to Public Policy, Political Theory, Public Policy Development
:::
:::

::: {.cv-section}
## Work Experience

::: {.cv-entry}
[Nathalie P. Voorhees Center for Neighborhood and Community Improvement]{.cv-left}
[Chicago, IL]{.cv-right}
:::
::: {.cv-role}
[Research Assistant]{.cv-title}
[June 2023 – Present]{.cv-date}
:::

<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Support the ADA-PARC project — a national research effort examining quality-of-life disparities for the disabled population across all 50 states and hundreds of geographic units.
    <ul class="cv-sub">
      <li>Produced Tableau dashboard to visualize outcome disparities between disabled and non-disabled populations nationwide.</li>
      <li>Built interactive website for geographic data display using R Shiny.</li>
      <li>Developed a Descriptive Analysis Report based on 2023 ACS 5-year estimate outcomes.</li>
    </ul>
  </li>
  <li>Support the City of Chicago 2025 Point-in-Time (PIT) Count — a federally mandated, citywide survey identifying 7,452 people experiencing homelessness, co-led by the Voorhees Center and DFSS.
    <ul class="cv-sub">
      <li>Contributed to data cleaning, analysis, and production of visualizations for the published 2025 PIT Count & Survey Report.</li>
    </ul>
  </li>
</ul>

::: {.cv-entry}
[Jefferson Educational Society]{.cv-left}
[Erie, PA]{.cv-right}
:::
::: {.cv-role}
[Research Intern]{.cv-title}
[May 2022 – November 2022]{.cv-date}
:::

<ul class="cv-bullets">
  <li>Produced and edited publications while assisting with research projects and programming for Erie's local political think tank.
    <ul class="cv-sub">
      <li>Published research analysis on Human Rights in Qatar — <a href="https://jeserie.org/uploads/Henneman 2022.pdf" target="_blank">jeserie.org/uploads/Henneman 2022.pdf</a></li>
      <li>Assisted the Jefferson team in facilitating the nationally recognized Global Summit.</li>
    </ul>
  </li>
</ul>
:::

::: {.cv-section}
## Skills

::: {.cv-skills-grid}
<span>Policy Analysis: Memo Writing, Evaluation</span>
<span>Quantitative & Qualitative Research Methods</span>
<span>Econometrics</span>
<span>Written & Verbal Communications</span>
<span>Stakeholder Engagement</span>
:::
:::

::: {.cv-section}
## Technical Skills

::: {.cv-detail}
**Software Proficiency:** R Studio, Quarto, LaTeX, Tableau, R Shiny, Git, Notion, Obsidian, Adobe Acrobat, Microsoft 365, Apple Ecosystem
:::
:::

::: {.cv-section}
## Additional

::: {.cv-detail}
**President of Active Minds UIUC (2021–2022):** Led student advocacy organization for mental health awareness; lobbied the counseling center to expand resources for students, succeeding in printing the suicide prevention hotline on all student I.D. cards.
:::
:::
